title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0133 Stoke Lodge Playing Fields, West Dene, Shirehampton, Bristol BS9 2BH
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Cotham School  Site address:  Stoke Lodge Playing Fields, West Dene, Shirehampton, Bristol BS9 2BH  Description of proposed development:  Works to install 8no. CCTV poles and cameras  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 5 November 2025   Date by when representations must be made 17 December 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 9 January 2026   Decision date 9 January 2026     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 217 KB, 10 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 17 December 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0133 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Forms  (PDF, 2.05 MB, 14 pages)  AW1545-BAS Datasheet v4.5  (PDF, 268 KB, 2 pages)  BNG Statutory Metric v3  (MS Excel Spreadsheet, 3.44 MB)  Camera Pole Elevation  (PDF, 68.4 KB, 1 page)  Ecology Briefing Note  (PDF, 936 KB, 10 pages)  Planning Statement inc. Appendices  (PDF, 2.22 MB, 52 pages)  Stoke Lodge CCTV - Tree Constraints Plan - TCP1A  (PDF, 787 KB, 1 page)  2025 CCTV P01-CCTV Site Location Plan  (PDF, 247 KB, 1 page)  2025 CCTV P02-CCTV Existing Site Plan  (PDF, 850 KB, 1 page)  2025 CCTV P03-CCTV Proposed Site Plan  (PDF, 912 KB, 1 page)  7741 100 Baseline Habitats Plan  (PDF, 3.25 MB, 1 page)  AH Heritage Statement  (PDF, 16.2 MB, 37 pages)  AIA TPP - Stoke Lodge CCTV - 21.11.25  (PDF, 1.47 MB, 16 pages)  Cotham School Playing Fields - CCTV...
